languages.text: {n}Вы отворачиваетесь от недоуменных лиц, однако все же чувствуете на себе обжигающие подозрительные взгляды. Впрочем, никто так и не пытается принудить вас к ответу.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Вы отворачиваетесь от недоуменных лиц, однако все же чувствуете на себе обжигающие подозрительные взгляды. Впрочем, никто так и не пытается принудить вас к ответу.{/n}

languages.text: {n}You turn away from their perplexed faces but you can still feel their suspicious gazes burning into you. However, no one makes any attempt to press the issue.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы отворачиваетесь от недоуменных лиц, однако все же чувствуете на себе обжигающие подозрительные взгляды. Впрочем, никто так и не пытается принудить вас к ответу.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}You turn away from the perplexed faces but still can feel the burn of suspicious looks. However, no one is trying to hold you to account.{/n}
{n}You turn away from the perplexed faces but still can feel the burn of suspicious looks. However, no one is trying to hold you to account.{/n}
{n}You turn away from their perplexed faces but you can still feel their suspicious gazes burning into you. However, no one makes any attempt to press the issue.{/n}
{n}You turn away from their perplexed faces but you can still feel their suspicious gazes burning into you. However, no one makes any attempt to press the issue.{/n}
{n}You turn away from their perplexed faces but you can still feel their suspicious gazes burning into you. However, no one makes any attempt to press the issue.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du wendest dich von ihren verwirrten Gesichtern ab, aber du spürst immer noch ihre misstrauischen Blicke auf dir. Keiner macht jedoch Anstalten, das Thema anzusprechen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You turn away from their perplexed faces but you can still feel their suspicious gazes burning into you. However, no one makes any attempt to press the issue.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Du wendest dich von ihren verwirrten Gesichtern ab, aber du spürst immer noch ihre misstrauischen Blicke auf dir. Keiner macht jedoch Anstalten, das Thema anzusprechen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous vous détournez de leurs visages perplexes, mais vous sentez encore leurs regards suspicieux qui vous brûlent. Cependant, personne n'essaie d'insister sur la question.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You turn away from their perplexed faces but you can still feel their suspicious gazes burning into you. However, no one makes any attempt to press the issue.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous vous détournez de leurs visages perplexes, mais vous sentez encore leurs regards suspicieux qui vous brûlent. Cependant, personne n'essaie d'insister sur la question.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Te apartas de sus rostros perplejos, pero sigues sintiendo sus miradas suspicaces clavadas en ti. Sin embargo, nadie intenta insistir.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You turn away from their perplexed faces but you can still feel their suspicious gazes burning into you. However, no one makes any attempt to press the issue.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Te apartas de sus rostros perplejos, pero sigues sintiendo sus miradas suspicaces clavadas en ti. Sin embargo, nadie intenta insistir.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Şaşkın yüzlerine sırtınızı dönüyorsunuz ama yine de şüpheci bakışlarının içinizi yaktığını hissedebiliyorsunuz. Ancak, kimse konuyu zorlamak için herhangi bir girişimde bulunmuyor.{/n}
